description_long: This object is an open book with a slightly curved, wavy form, as if it is lying open on a surface. The pages are a light, off-white color, and each page features a series of evenly spaced, horizontal black lines, suggesting stylized text or writing. The book's cover and pages appear to be made from a single, continuous material, with no visible separation between the cover and the inner pages. The edges of the book are smooth and rounded, and the spine is gently arched, giving the book a soft, organic appearance. There are no visible illustrations, images, or decorative elements on the cover or pages. The overall design is minimalistic and abstract, focusing on the essential form of an open book.
description: A minimalistic, open book with wavy, off-white pages and black horizontal lines representing text. The design is smooth, rounded, and lacks any cover illustration or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the open pages with black horizontal lines and the book's wavy, symmetrical shape.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the book's thickness, curved spine, and the visible black lines on the pages.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the arched spine and the smooth, continuous surface of the book's back.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the book's thickness and the curvature of the pages.
